column3: This file should be populated with ALL claims that the layout convertor (eg: edifecs/PCS/SDS/OCR) received in the 837 file/paper format and populate the status of each record to denote if they are  succesfully converted to XML and transmitted to HPSCIL/HRP. PULSE360 application needs this information to identify the fallout of claims that happened within different Vendors (eg: Edifecs/PCS/SDS/OCR) and thus to balance the inbound and outbound data within the ecosystem.

UST_<Layout Converter Name>_AllClaims_<Healthplan>_<Frequency>_<generatedTimeStamp>.csv
Example: UST_PCS_AllClaims_HHO_Daily_12082021144200.csv
csv
Description

Example - PCS/SDS/OCR/Edifecs etc

This is a Must have field for PULSE to calculate the transaction requests per file per day.
This filename should help to segregate the list of distinct files received from source and hence it is recommended to add created/received timestamp in the name for uniqueness of file name.
